Description
ch.varani.lego.ble.api
Public API for the Bluetooth LE library for LEGO Powered Up and compatible devices.
ch.varani.lego.ble.impl.macos
 

  • Uses of BleScanner in ch.varani.lego.ble.api

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static @NonNull BleScanner
    BleScannerFactory.create()
    Creates and returns a new BleScanner backed by the platform BLE stack appropriate for the current operating system.
